testCases.title: Verify that login fails with both invalid username and password

steps.action: Enter username "invalidUser999" in the username field
Enter password "wrongPassword123" in the password field

steps.expected: Login request should be submitted for authentication

steps.action: Verify invalid credentials error message is displayed
steps.expected: Error message indicating authentication failure should appear

steps.action: Verify user remains on login page
steps.expected: User should not be redirected to authenticated area
